name: OpcodeOne
author: Antonio Rodríguez
notes: This directory is the authoritative machine-readable source for the closed OpcodeOne ISA forms currently captured.
Canonical syntax only. Compact syntax is documented separately as a non-normative surface and remains outside the normative source set.
Numeric family opcode assignments are fixed in opcode_slots.json for the current closed v0.9 families.
Family and form JSON files follow a normalized structure intended to stay stable as the ISA grows.
